title: Dohazāri Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Dohazāri, with a Z-Score of +3.54. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Dohazāri is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 78%, and the wind speed is 12.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
